title: cleistochloa rigida
intro: Cleistochloa rigida, also known as the stiff grass tree, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to Australia. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleistochloa rigida include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Cleistochloa rigida can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
